criteria.description: engine/split/ depends only on a SplitProposer interface (ProposeSplit(fileContent) -> plan); no direct gRPC/agent dependency exists yet
criteria.validation: proposer.go defines SplitProposer with no imports; go list -deps ./split/... shows no grpc-related package
criteria.covered_by: self-consistency step: go list -deps grep -i grpc (expect empty); manual review of proposer.go's import block (expect none)

criteria.description: go build ./engine/split/... succeeds with zero imports of a gRPC client package
go test ./engine/split/... -run TestSplitProposerInterface asserts the interface contract via a trivial fake
criteria.validation: proposer_test.go's TestSplitProposerInterface compiles a fakeSplitProposer against the SplitProposer interface and asserts returned SplitPlan/error

criteria.description: No regression to already-implemented 2b.1.1/2b.1.2/2b.1.3 (trigger.go/guard.go/orchestrate.go untouched, their tests still pass)
criteria.validation: trigger.go/guard.go/orchestrate.go left byte-for-byte unmodified (git diff shows only new files); full package test suite green
criteria.covered_by: self-consistency step: go test ./split/... -race -v -count=1 -timeout 10m; git status/diff review before commit

criteria.description: SplitPlan shape is minimal and does not over-design fields issue #12 or 2b.2.2 haven't asked for
criteria.validation: SplitPlan limited to Files []SplitFileProposal + RedirectSummary string; SplitFileProposal limited to NewPath + SectionRanges; SectionRange limited to Start/End
criteria.covered_by: manual review during implementation + architecture-discovery.md's stated rationale
